titles.title: Guimi Zhi Zhu: Wu Mian Ren
诡秘之主 无面人篇

data.title: Guimi Zhi Zhu: Wu Mian Ren
title_synonyms: 诡秘之主 无面人篇
data.synopsis:
After his resurrection, Klein, now known as Sherlock, becomes a private detective. While taking on cases, he inadvertently provokes a spy organization. With the help of his bodyguard Sharron, as well as the assistance of Audrey and others, he faces many enemies, including the powerful Ambassador of Intis. In a later case, Klein unexpectedly discovers ruins from the Tudor dynasty. While continuing his detective work, Klein searches for clues to his advancement while also pursuing his enemies, Lanevus and Intis…

(Source: Tencent, translated & edited)

data.title: Bless
data.synopsis:
In a boisterous classroom, 15-year-old Aia Udagawa's thoughts are far from the topic at hand. While his classmates select him as a model for the Aoi Festival Artist Contest due to his past modeling experience, Udagawa watches Jun Sumisaki, a tall and awkward girl who seems embarrassed about her unique freckles and impressive height. They are paired as model and stylist—but Udagawa defeatedly mourns his abandoned dream of becoming a makeup artist.

Udagawa has long convinced himself he has no talent, and Sumisaki lacks the confidence to hold her head high and flaunt her stunning features. Even so, Sumisaki proposes that they switch: Udagawa will have all creative freedom, and she will boldly strut the runway like her mother once taught her. Notable figures from the glamor industry will be watching, but it may prove to be the push Udagawa needs to return to the fashion and beauty scene and conquer it alongside his favorite model.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: Bousai Namazun no Jishin wa Kanarazu Yattekuru
防災ナマズンの地震は必ずやってくる

data.title: Bousai Namazun no Jishin wa Kanarazu Yattekuru
data.title_japanese: 防災ナマズンの地震は必ずやってくる
data.synopsis:
One night, Naoyuki's family watches a disaster prevention anime DVD distributed at school. Even though Bousai Namazun teaches them about the Tokai, Tonankai, and Nankai earthquakes that could strike at any time, the older brother, Naoyuki, can only think, "Is an earthquake really going to happen?"

The next day, a major earthquake occurs while their father and mother are away. Even though they want to go to an evacuation shelter, the furniture throughout the house has fallen over, and the living room door is warped, so they cannot open it by themselves. "What if Mom doesn't come back...?" his younger sister, Sayaka, starts to cry. Is their father, who went to a seaside factory, safe? The two wait anxiously for help. At that moment...

(Source: Official site, translated)

(Source: YouTube)

titles.title: Mao he Lao Shu: Xing Pan qi Yuan

data.title: Mao he Lao Shu: Xing Pan qi Yuan
data.synopsis:
Tom and Jerry: Forbidden Compass follows the iconic cat-and-mouse duo as they accidentally travel through time in a museum. Along their journey, they meet a group of intriguing new companions and become involved in a final showdown with mysterious forces.

(Source: Deadline)
data.background: The film's runtime was cut down for the US release, shortening it to 92 minutes. Premiered at the Shanghai International Film Festival on June 20, 2025.

data.title: J⇔Ｍ
data.synopsis:
J is a legendary hitman who is feared in the underworld as "untouchable." One day, while walking on the street, he accidentally collides into a lonely elementary school girl named Megumi. However, because of the accident, they switch bodies.

J is now forced to go through the life of the schoolgirl Megumi, while Megumi is now forced to go through the life of the hitman J. One chaotic and comical situation after another ensues as they go through each other's life.

(Source: MAL News)
